notes: Light Magna (M3) grid. True Purity Sunblade MH (Xeno ULB), Luminiera Bolt Credo x3 (M3 FLB), Pillar of Flame x3 (M2 FLB), Rhongomyniad ULB, Ultima Sword ULB (gauph: Strife + alpha + Tria, user-confirmed), Sword of Renunciation. Summons: main Luminiera Omega 250, friend Lucifer 250, subs Metatron/Halluel and Malluel/Lu Woh 4*/Belial/The Star/Mars (Summer). Optimus enhancement 40 = Lu Woh's SUB aura (Six-Dragon sub auras apply from regular sub slots). Panel: DMG Cap 20 orange (capped; Vivification 1% x 7 omega-skill weapons x 3 counts the opus's omega s1). Sword of Renunciation lvl 230 (transcendence 3, SL20: omega Might 76x3.3=250.8, omega DMG Amp 1.75x3.3=5.775) with beta Pendulum + Chain of Temptation (all user-confirmed). Skill DMG Cap 50 = beta 50 + Astral Pierce II 50 in the shared same-cap key group (cap-boosting keys do not stack per the Ultima wiki note). Purple lines = the Sunblade's AX skills (HP +8, Stamina +3 -> displays 5%). Sunveil's Radiance (Xeno MH Normal-stamina, Eden curve 15 at 100% HP, not summon-boosted) does NOT appear on the panel's weapon-skill lines.
